basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Port Authority Traffic Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Port Authority Traffic Executive Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website www.deendayalport.gov.in. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the Deendayal Port Authority Traffic Executive Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC(NCL) 03 years, SC/ST 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduate Degree along with full time Post Graduate Degree/ Post Graduate Diploma in logistics/ shipping/ port/ maritime management or allied disciplines or business management/ business administration, Knowledge of computer in general and in-depth working knowledge of MS office suits
qualification.details: Full time Graduate Degree along with full time Post Graduate Degree/ Post Graduate Diploma from a University recognized by the Govt. Of India in logistics/ shipping/ port/ maritime management or allied disciplines or business management/ business administration. Knowledge of computer in general and in-depth working knowledge of MS office suits.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.deendayalport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Traffic Executive post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Traffic Executive post is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Traffic Executive role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time Graduate Degree along with a full-time Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in logistics, shipping, port, maritime management, or business management/administration. Computer knowledge is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Traffic Executive position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Traffic Executive post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC(NCL) and SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Traffic Executive post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Traffic Executive post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for the Traffic Executive position in Deendayal Port Authority.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application for this recruitment must be submitted in Offline mode by sending the application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Deendayal Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Deendayal Port Authority is located in New Kandla, Gujarat, with the pincode 370210.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis for the Traffic Executive position.
